channel.title: Memory-Management on The Logbook
channel.description: Recent content in Memory-Management on The Logbook

item.title: Rudimentary Interpreter
item.description: This project page details a functional, custom implementation of the dynamic memory allocation functions my_malloc and my_free built in C. The allocator directly requests memory from the kernel using anonymous memory mappings (mmap) and manages allocated blocks via a sequential, padded linked-list metadata tracking system.
